creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jordan Morningstar from comment #1)

Just now, I patched our local copy of ca_root_nss to add two local CA certs.

So far, so good.  I'll see how it goes as the FreeBSD port is updated.

For now, I'm trying: +PORTVERSION=   ${VERSION_NSS}.1

When appending, the main file looksl ike this:

##  Number of certificates: 151
##  End of file.
-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
our two certs

That EOF comment is cosmetic, I'm sure.
